description:
Model a 15m × 25m Quonset hut (semi-cylindrical building) oriented East-West and install solar panels on the middle section of its south-facing curved roof using Skelion. 

Starting from an empty SketchUp Make 2017 scene:
1. Draw a 15m x 25m footprint (long axis along the Red/East-West axis).
2. Create a semi-circular roof profile and extrude it 25m to form the Quonset hut.
3. Enable Hidden Geometry to see the individual flat segments of the curved roof.
4. Select multiple segments on the south-facing side of the curve (avoiding the very top flat part and very bottom steep part).
5. Use the Skelion plugin to insert standard solar panels in Landscape orientation onto these selected curved segments.
6. Save the final model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\quonset_solar.skp'.
